title: Bridge Essay: Functional magnetic resonance imaging of inner speech in schizophrenia.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Daimonic voice — voice-hearing continuum, inner speech misattribution, corollary discharge.

**Functional magnetic resonance imaging of inner speech in schizophrenia.**. Biol Psychiatry.. PMID: 19846064. DOI: 10.1016/j.biopsych.2009.09.007. BACKGROUND: Auditory verbal hallucinations in schizophrenia have been linked to defective monitoring of one'sown verbal thoughts. Previous studies have shown that patients with auditory verbal hallucinations show attenuated activation of brain regions involved with auditory processing during the monitoring of inner speech. However, there are no functional magnetic resonance imaging studies explicitly comparing the perception of external speech with internal speech in the same patients with schi
